content.verdict: Ozen Reserve Bolifushi is South Malé Atoll's best answer to 'luxury all-inclusive' — the Indulgence plan wraps in wine-paired tasting menus, complimentary dives, and sunset cruises. 70 villas, a young and stylish crowd, and predictable high-end food mean you can enjoy a boundless honeymoon without bill shock.
content.best_room: The Earth Water Pool Pavilion — overwater with glass floor panels, private pool, and a cozy indoor-outdoor layout. For beach time, the Earth Beach Pool Pavilion is a romantic sand-front alternative.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 25-minute luxury speedboat from Malé. Welcome cocktail, villa intro, dinner at M6m (the underwater restaurant is a short boat hop).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wine Pairing Debut
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning house-reef snorkel, relaxed pool lunch, Indulgence wine-pairing dinner at The Palms — included in plan.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Two-Tank Dive (Included)
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning dive at nearby reef, included in Indulgence plan. Afternoon couples massage at the spa, sunset dhoni cruise.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sandbank & Romance
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private sandbank Champagne picnic, evening beach dinner under lanterns with a personal butler.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day couples ritual — hammam, massage, facials. Dinner at Peking Chinese restaurant with wine pairing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: M6m Underwater Dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Speedboat to sister resort Ozen Life Maadhoo's underwater restaurant for a tasting menu. Drinks back at the Bolifushi bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast, final pool swim, speedboat back to Malé.

caveats: The all-inclusive plan is required — transparent pricing but not cheap
House reef is less vibrant than Baa Atoll resorts
Popular with honeymoon-age couples — lively rather than silent

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — one of the best all-inclusive honeymoon experiences thanks to the Indulgence plan.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December to April for dry season; low season offers strong value.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but adult-oriented in vibe with a young-couple crowd.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Earth Water Pool Pavilion for honeymoons.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 25-minute speedboat from Velana International Airport (MLE) — no seaplane.
